trending.title: A New View of the Moon Earth sets at 5:41 p.m. CDT, April 6, 2026, over the Moon’s curved limb in this photo captured by the Artemis II crew during their journey around the far side of the Moon. Orientale Basin is perched on the edge of the visible lunar surface. Hertzsprung Basin appears as two subtle concentric rings, which are interrupted by Vavilov, a younger crater superimposed over the older structure. Image Credit: NASA
trending.author: NASA

trending.title: Gondolas drifting through Venice turn everyday movement into pure romance. This image highlights traditional boats floating along calm canals, surrounded by historic facades and authentic Italian atmosphere. Street photography blends with travel photography, capturing slow travel, love, and timeless beauty. Perfect for Venice gondola, Italy romance, couple travel, and European lifestyle visuals. Water reflections, gentle motion, and classic architecture transform this scene into an instantly recognizable Venice moment.
trending.author: Lens by Benji

trending.title: A breathtaking view of a turquoise glacial lake, its icy waters reflecting the towering, snow-capped Himalayan peaks that rise sharply against a vivid, cloudless blue sky. The pristine white snow and dark, rugged rock faces create a striking contrast, highlighting the raw, untouched beauty of this remote alpine landscape.
trending.author: Jimmy Liu
